title: Hello World
content:
随着自己学习计算机的内容越来越深入，枯燥无味的气息充斥了我的学习生活。

为了打破这种局面，我决定弄个博客来记录我的计算机学习生涯。

开始学习计算机的时间是在高中，不过高中的我并没有太深入地学习计算机，在弄懂计算机的基础原理概念并学习掌握了一些编程后，就没有继续深入学习。

因此，现在既是新手也是老手的我，有着很大的学习空间与学习潜力，加油吧！！

As I delve deeper into computer learning, the air of tedium has filled my study life.

To break this situation, I’ve decided to start a blog to record my computer learning journey.

I began learning computer science in high school, but back then I didn’t go too deep into it. After understanding the basic principles and concepts of computers and learning some programming, I didn’t continue to study further.

So now, I’m both a newbie and an experienced learner, with a lot of learning space and potential. Come on!!
